metadata.title: LKR DJ TOOLs — Tools for DJs
metadata.description: Download music, convert lossless audio, and organize your set. Modern DJ tools with no database.

tools.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to prepare your set

downloader.title: Downloader
downloader.description: Download audio from YouTube, SoundCloud and Spotify in high quality.

converter.title: Converter
converter.description: Convert FLAC and M4A to lossless WAV, 100% on your device.

rekordbox.title: Rekordbox Analyzer
rekordbox.description: XML analysis to suggest set structures and crate organization.

privacy.title: Total privacy
privacy.description: Conversions run in your browser. No files stored on servers.

lossless.title: Lossless quality
lossless.description: FLAC/M4A to WAV conversion without unnecessary recompression.

noDatabase.title: No database
noDatabase.description: Serverless architecture on Vercel. Zero data persistence.

mobile.title: Mobile-first
mobile.description: Responsive interface optimized for desktop and mobile.

step2.title: Paste or drag
step2.description: Music URL or audio file in supported format.

step3.title: Download the result
step3.description: Get the file ready for your set.

footer.disclaimer: Use only for content you have the right to download. LKR DJ TOOLs does not store files or personal data.

downloader.title: Music Downloader
downloader.subtitle: Download high-quality audio from major platforms
downloader.spotifyWarning: Spotify does not allow direct downloads. We automatically find the equivalent track on YouTube.

errors.failed: Download failed. Try again or use another URL.
errors.noMatch: Could not find a YouTube match. Try pasting the YouTube link directly.

converter.title: Audio Converter
converter.subtitle: Convert FLAC and M4A to lossless WAV — 100% on your device
converter.dropzone: Drag files here or click to select
converter.dropzoneHint: Supports FLAC, M4A, MP3 and AAC
converter.mobileWarning: Local conversion may take longer on mobile devices. Large files (>100MB) may not be supported.

rekordbox.title: Rekordbox Analyzer
rekordbox.subtitle: Coming soon: intelligent XML analysis
rekordbox.description: We're building a tool to analyze Rekordbox XML exports and suggest set structures, crate organization, and library insights.
rekordbox.notify: Want to be notified when it launches?
